message:
Assign Agent 2: PyObject protocol + PyUnicode (35 functions)

NEXT PRIORITY TASK ASSIGNED TO AGENT 2

Task: Implement PyObject Protocol + PyUnicode Operations
Functions: 35 (15 PyObject + 20 PyUnicode)
Timeline: 6-8 hours
Priority: HIGHEST - CRITICAL for NumPy!

Why Critical:
=============

PyObject Protocol:
- PyObject_Call - Enables calling Python functions from C
- PyObject_GetAttr/SetAttr - Required for attribute access
- PyObject_Str/Repr - String conversions
- PyObject_RichCompare - Comparisons (==, <, etc.)
- ESSENTIAL for NumPy to work!

PyUnicode Operations:
- PyUnicode_FromString - String creation
- PyUnicode_AsUTF8 - String extraction
- PyUnicode_Concat/Format - String operations
- NEEDED for function names, error messages

Files to Create:
================

1. cpython_object_protocol.zig (~400-500 lines)
2. cpython_unicode.zig (~500-600 lines)

Impact:
=======

After completion:
- Total: 108 functions (35% of 309)
- Time: ~17-19 hours total
- Speedup: Still 10-12x!

What This Enables:
- Function calls from C
- Attribute access
- String handling
- Much closer to NumPy compatibility!

Prompt ready at .claude/2/prompt.md for Agent 2 to start!
